description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with a distinctive checkered overcoat that extends to mid-thigh, worn over dark leggings. The figure has long, wavy hair styled in two buns on top, with loose strands framing the face. The face is detailed with visible makeup, including pronounced eye shadow and lipstick, giving a fashionable urban appearance. The hands are gloved, and the figure wears tall, slouchy boots with pointed toes and high heels, adding to the modern, city-ready look. The overall silhouette is slim, with the arms extended horizontally. The back of the coat features a bow or ribbon detail, enhancing the character's unique style.
description: A fashionable adult pedestrian with a checkered overcoat, long wavy hair in buns, gloves, and tall heeled boots, exuding a modern urban vibe.
description_view_0: Front view shows the checkered overcoat, gloves, facial makeup, and the full hairstyle with buns and loose strands.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the length and volume of the hair, and the slouchy boots' shape.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the bow or ribbon detail on the back of the coat and the full length of the hair cascading down.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the hair's volume, coat's fit, and the boots' profile.
attribute_clothing_type: long checkered overcoat, gloves, leggings, tall heeled boots, hair styled in buns with ribbon detail
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: long wavy hair styled in two buns with loose strands
